_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your Notion IDs. See docs/configuration.md for details. To add a new team digest, add a new top-level key (e.g. '<my-team>-digest') with the same structure.

notion.config_page_id_help: 32-char hex from the Notion config page URL (notion.so/<this-id>)
notion.database_id_help: 32-char hex from the Notion database URL (notion.so/<this-id>)

orgs.name: your-org
orgs.priority_repos_help: Repos that get full narrative summaries. Empty list means no priority repos.
orgs.scan_all_help: true = scan all repos in the org; false = only scan priority repos

team-digest.rss_feeds_help: Public content sources monitored for items dated to the digest day. URLs starting with https:// are fetched as RSS/Atom via lib/fetch-rss.sh. URLs of the form github://<owner>/<repo>[/<path>] are fetched as commits via lib/fetch-gh-commits.sh - useful for spec sets that don't publish RSS but live in a public git repo. Add entries with the shape {"name": "<display name>", "url": "<feed-or-github-url>", "category": "<grouping label>"}.

hip_tracking.enabled_help: Set to false to disable the HIP Activity source and HIP cross-reference annotations. Useful for forkers who don't track Hedera/Hiero HIPs.
hip_tracking.repo_help: GitHub owner/repo for the HIP source. Default is the canonical Hiero HIP repository.
hip_tracking.path_help: Subdirectory inside the HIP repo where hip-N.md files live. Note: singular HIP, not HIPS.
hip_tracking.implementation_orgs_help: Orgs to search for HIP-referencing PRs/commits (Mechanism B). Defaults to hiero-ledger; add others if your team's integration repos reference HIPs.
hip_tracking.max_hips_with_implementation_expansion_h: Cap on how many of today's touched HIPs get full implementation-PR lookup. HIPs above this cap appear in an 'Other HIPs touched today' overflow list without implementation expansion.

strategy2.max_refs_per_release_help: Cap on HIP references extracted from a single release (tag/name + body). Overflow logs a [Notice] and is truncated.
strategy2.max_backfill_days_help: Cap on --backfill N days for fetch-hip-release-refs.sh. Larger windows require --force-backfill.

hip_tracking.strategy2_help: Strategy 2 (release-note analysis) settings. Scans release notes from implementation_orgs repos for HIP references; high confidence if HIP-N is in tag/name, medium if only in body. See docs/hip-tracking.md.

strategy3.max_correlation_hips_help: Cap on how many status-changed HIPs Strategy 3 correlates against PRs per run.
strategy3.per_org_search_budget_help: Cap on gh search calls per org per run. Exponential 1s/2s/4s backoff on 429; after 3 retries, the org is skipped with a s3_skipped MatchRecord.
strategy3.noise_ceiling_commits_per_day_help: Repos with more than N commits on the digest day get their Strategy 3 matches downgraded to low confidence (high-volume area, attribution ambiguous).
strategy3.category_to_repos_help: Tiebreaker map used when Strategy 3 keyword overlap is 1-2 tokens. If a candidate PR's repo is in the list for the HIP's category, the match is emitted as low confidence; otherwise the match is dropped.

hip_tracking.strategy3_help: Strategy 3 (timeline correlation) settings. Searches past-7d PRs in implementation_orgs that mention HIP-N or share keywords with the HIP title. Falls back to category-to-repo tiebreaker when keyword overlap is 1-2. See docs/hip-tracking.md.

defaults.keywords_help: Default keyword list used to scan Notion when the live config page is unreachable. Replace with your team's relevant terms.
